🚀 Big Launches.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new 'dynamic workflow' tool
🚀 Big Launches.summary: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: YouTube will let you ask AI to make a custom video feed
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: YouTube is launching a new AI feature that creates a personalized video feed based on descriptions of what you want to watch.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: CNN sues Perplexity over 'verbatim' copycat articles
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate 'verbatim' copies of its work.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets.

tool_of_day.title: YouTube's AI feature for custom video feeds
tool_of_day.summary: YouTube is launching a new AI feature that creates a personalized video feed based on descriptions of what you want to watch.

hot_take: The AI industry is rapidly evolving, with companies like Asana and YouTube incorporating AI features into their products, and startups like Anthropic and Perplexity pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI.
